</mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="2. 生成 PKCE 参数<br>code_verifier (随机)<br>code_challenge=SHA256(verifier)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="155" x="37" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="3. 302 重定向<br><b>GET /authorize</b><br>response_type=code<br>client_id=crm_app<br>redirect_uri=/callback<br>scope=openid profile<br>code_challenge=xxx<br>code_challenge_method=S256<br>state=随机防CSRF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="155" x="37" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" value="10. 校验 state 防 CSRF<br>提取 code" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="155" x="33" y="638" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="11. 后端用 code 换 Token<br><b>POST /token</b><br>grant_type=authorization_code<br>code=xxx<br>code_verifier=原始值<br>client_id=crm_app<br>client_secret=secret" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="155" x="33" y="755" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c5" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" value="13. 解析 ID Token (JWT)<br>获取用户身份信息<br>创建本地会话" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="155" x="33" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c6" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" value="14. 调用 API<br>Header: Authorization<br>Bearer {access_token}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="155" x="33" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c7" parent="lane-c" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;dashed=1;" value="16. Access Token 过期→<br>用 Refresh Token 换新" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="155" x="33" y="1130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-a" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=28;fillColor=#fff0e6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;html=1;" value="Authorization Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1340" width="389" x="430" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="5. 展示登录页面<br>(首次需输入凭据)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="155" x="35" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" value="7. 验证凭据<br>生成授权码 (code)<br>有效期 ~30秒，一次性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="155" x="35" y="493" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="8. <b>302 重定向</b><br>/callback?code=xxx<br>&state=yyy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="155" x="35" y="583" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="12. 校验 PKCE<br>SHA256(code_verifier) == code_challenge ?<br>校验通过 → 签发 Token<br><b>返回</b> {id_token, access_token, refresh_token}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="155" x="32" y="823" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a5" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;dashed=1;" value="17. 验证 Refresh Token<br>签发新 Token 对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="155" x="35" y="1130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" parent="lane-a" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fce4ec;strokeColor=#e91e63;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=8;dashed=1;" value="<b>关键安全措施</b><br>• state 参数防 CSRF<br>• PKCE 防授权码截获<br>• code 一次性 + 短有效期<br>• client_secret 不出现在浏览器<br>• redirect_uri 严格匹配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="780" x="-391" y="1201" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-r" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=28;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;html=1;" value="Resource Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1340" width="195" x="625" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="lane-r" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=6;" value="15. 验证 JWT 签名<br>校验过期时间<br>校验 scope 权限<br>返回业务数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="155" x="33" y="1042" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="b1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 401px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.b: OAuth 2.0 授权码模式 + PKCE 完整流程图

switch.text: OAuth 2.0 授权码模式 + PKCE 完整流程图

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 244, 248), rgb(20, 31, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 710px; margin-left: 15px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: User Browser

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 98px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 点击
"SSO登录"

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 364px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. 浏览器跟随
重定向到 AS

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 561px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 6. 提交用户名+密码

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 728px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
9. 浏览器携带
code 回调 Client

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 710px; margin-left: 210px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Client App (业务系统)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 147px; height: 1px; padding-top: 163px; margin-left: 241px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. 生成 PKCE 参数
code_verifier (随机)
code_challenge=SHA256(verifier)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 147px; height: 1px; padding-top: 285px; margin-left: 241px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. 302 重定向
GET /authorize
response_type=code
client_id=crm_app
redirect_uri=/callback
scope=openid profile
code_challenge=xxx
code_challenge_method=S256
state=随机防CSRF

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 701px; margin-left: 230px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
10. 校验 state 防 CSRF
提取 code

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 147px; height: 1px; padding-top: 841px; margin-left: 237px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
11. 后端用 code 换 Token
POST /token
grant_type=authorization_code
code=xxx
code_verifier=原始值
client_id=crm_app
client_secret=secret

switch.text: 11. 后端用 code 换 Token...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 963px; margin-left: 230px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
13. 解析 ID Token (JWT)
获取用户身份信息
创建本地会话

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1068px; margin-left: 230px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1195px; margin-left: 230px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
16. Access Token 过期→
用 Refresh Token 换新

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 240, 230), rgb(40, 27, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 710px; margin-left: 405px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Authorization Server

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 403px; margin-left: 427px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. 展示登录页面
(首次需输入凭据)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 561px; margin-left: 427px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
7. 验证凭据
生成授权码 (code)
有效期 ~30秒，一次性

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

/callback?code=xxx
&state=yyy

12. 校验 PKCE
SHA256(code_verifier) == code_challenge ?
校验通过 → 签发 Token
返回 {id_token, access_token, refresh_token}

17. 验证 Refresh Token
签发新 Token 对

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 228, 236), rgb(52, 31, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(233, 30, 99), rgb(255, 128, 187));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 770px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1279px; margin-left: 10px;

div.div:
关键安全措施
• state 参数防 CSRF
• PKCE 防授权码截获
• code 一次性 + 短有效期
• client_secret 不出现在浏览器
• redirect_uri 严格匹配

switch.text: 关键安全措施• state 参数防 CSRF...
